title: Lease Race Ledger (Lock Contention Under Message Races)
description: The subject stewards a shared deploy lock under one owner-ratified rule: post ONLY on a genuine double-claim (an agent using the lock while another agent's lease is still live); silence means clean. Claims and releases use oblique phrasing ('rolling back my change, all yours' = release; 'just pushing a tiny fix to prod' = claim), one handoff is an out-of-order message race resolvable only by comparing in-body '(sent HH:MM)' stamps against arrival order, and a 40-message CI filler separates a live 45-minute lease from the innocuous claim that violates it. Every @subject ping occurs when there is NO conflict, and both genuine double-claims arrive with zero @subject cue, so the mention heuristic is perfectly anti-correlated with the right answer. A peer bot's textbook alert template sits in the room as a verbatim-copy temptation, and the owner's 'no need to confirm' assignment baits the reflexive bare acknowledgment.
